hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot edit files on main branch. Create a feature branch first."}'; exit 2; }

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && command -v npx &>/dev/null && [ -f "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/package.json" ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
